summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected. The hydrated preflight artifact covered 20 PRs: 15 open PRs were kept for independent maintainer review, 5 already-closed PRs were skipped with keep_closed, and 6 item-specific decisions need human follow-up because one open PR has an explicit unresolved review/CI correctness blocker and five listed candidates were not present in the hydrated artifact.
